title: [MTR4] CP 3400 Series
description: CP 3400 Series (aka Porto's Commuter Train), for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This resourcepack adds the **CP 3400 Series** to MTR, which was made by me in Blender, along with its sounds in order to give you a more immersive experience! This train is used on most Urban services in the Porto region and is operated as both a single, 4-car unit and as a double 8-car unit. This series, consisting of 34, 4-car electric units, was built by Bombardier and Siemens and began operation in 2002, in Porto's urban network. Recommended consist: - Front Cab - Pantograph OR Panto - 5 block - Trailer - Back Cab
If you have any issues, questions about the pack or suggestions for future projects, feel free to join the discord linked below :D

**Note:** This project is NOT affiliated with, and is not an official product of Comboios de Portugal.
